# Archive

This folder contains completed planning documents, session summaries, and historical design proposals from the MTG Assistant project.

## Purpose

The archive preserves historical context and decision-making artifacts without cluttering the main `.github/` directory. All files here represent completed work that may be useful for reference but is no longer actively maintained.

## Contents

### Session Summaries
- `OVERNIGHT_SESSION_SUMMARY.md` - Autonomous overnight work on Phases 20-23
- `phase-35b-session-summary.md` - Phase 35B implementation details
- `phase-35b-checklist.md` - Phase 35B task checklist
- `phase-35b-test-guide.md` - Testing guide for Phase 35B

### Design Proposals (Completed)
- `design-proposal.md` - Original design system implementation plan
- `design-proposal-hybrid.md` - Hybrid design approach
- `design-analysis.md` - Design system analysis
- `design-gap-analysis.md` - Design gap assessment
- `button-design-system-plan.md` - Button component design plan
- `radial-ring-design-proposal.md` - Radial progress ring design

### Fix Plans (Completed)
- `fix-data-loading-failures.md` - Data loading issue resolution
- `fix-key-cards-validation.md` - Key cards validation fixes
- `icon-audit-plan.md` - Icon system audit and improvements

### Historical Archives
- `copilot-plan-archive-2026-04-12.md` - Complete project plan archive snapshot from April 12, 2026

## Active Documentation

For current, actively maintained documentation, see the main `.github/` directory:
- `copilot-plan.md` - Current project roadmap and single source of truth
- `security-audit.md` - Security considerations
- `performance-audit-leagues.md` - Performance analysis
- `league-design-audit.md` - League feature design audit
- `test-plan.md` - Testing strategy
- `DEPLOYMENT.md` - Deployment procedures
- And more...

---

> **Note**: All files in this archive are preserved in git history and can be referenced at any time. Nothing is deleted, just organized for better maintainability.
